title: Cheboksary、Chuvashia — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Cheboksary、Chuvashia的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Cheboksary是Chuvashia的一個城市，人口約500,000。The capital of Chuvashia, a Volga River city with a unique Chuvash cultural heritage, modern hydroelectric plant, and scenic waterfront.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
